data.text: M08/P06 FELISIAN. FIRST, THE BAD NEWS: LANDINGS AT 22.80, 231.56,
349.10 WERE ON BARREN, MOUNTAINOUS GROUND. NOW THEN, LANDING AT
202.62 WAS THE SAME WITJH A LONG MESA WITH (TO MY UNFORTUNATE
EXPERIENCE) A LARGE CHASM AT ONE END. AT 304.118 IT WAS SOMEWHAT
FLATTER WITH HILLY GROUND AND A LARGE NARROW LAKE. AT LEAST HERE I
SAW ONE OF THOSE CREEPING HOPPERS. THIS WORLD IS NOT GOING TO BE ON
ANYONE'S 'TO TOUR' LIST (UNLESS THEY'RE INTO SUFFERING). PRO 0.261.000
